title: Traceability row
description: One row of the derived traceability matrix: a requirement and the entities that provide its evidence, plus a coverage flag. Derived from the registers, never hand-maintained (see traceability.md).

decisions.description: Decisions/ADRs explaining why it is built this way.

work_items.description: WBS work items where it gets built.

acceptance.description: Acceptance criteria defining when it is done/accepted.

coverage.description: Derived coverage flag. 'gap' on any MVP requirement missing a required column fails G-TRACE.
